name: journal-codex-plugin
description: Codex workflows for maintaining a configured journal data git repository from any workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Use configured journal data from any workspace.
interface.longDescription: Journal provides Codex skills for using a configured journalDataDir from any workspace: add missing titles, excerpts, tags, and image metadata, generate weekly reflections that help cultivate everyday taste through journal entries, and record every batch change under journalDataDir/logs/ai.
defaultPrompt: Use $journal-tag-backfill to scan my configured journal data and add missing titles, excerpts, and tags.
Use $journal-weekly-review to read last week's journal and write a weekly reflection about everyday taste.
